examples: DO NOT uncork the champagne but it may be worth cracking open a beer.
As soon as you uncork a bottle, CO2 starts diffusing from the champagne into the air.
Ever been in the midst of battle, and find yourself without the time to uncork that heal potion?
Uncork the leftovers (if there are any) the next day for a turkey sandwich with cranberry relish.
But if you want to shake up that early summer tradition, skip the brewskie and uncork a bottle of wine instead.
